primary_question: Which Titan session, gate, closeout, memory, recall, redaction, candidate, owner-route, and bridge measures may be described as weaker projections?
observation_rule: Treat the documented metric vocabulary as a projection specification only; no Titan receipt, evaluation output, memory record, gate event, or owner route is bound or computed by this part.

owner_truth_inputs.truth_scope: Titan identity, role, cohort, gate, and owner-mechanic meaning
Titan session and receipt helper contracts
Titan seed-canary and future scorer alignment, without a current full verdict surface
Durable memory truth, recall, redaction, and confirmation state

authority_ceiling: The operation may document candidate projection fields but cannot own memory truth, Titan identity, role meaning, gate state, session truth, proof, routing, or workflow state.
non_catalog_reason: The part is a documentation-level projection specification with no active computed public surface.
prohibited_inferences: A documented metric proves that a receipt, memory record, recall, redaction, or gate event exists.
Counts establish Titan identity, role, cohort, or owner authority.
Stats may confirm memory, open a gate, or replace proof and workflow owners.
